port_metadata.provider: Compañía Marítima Mexicana, S.A. de C.V.

geographic_scope_and_terminals.limits: Jurisdictional waters of the Port of Manzanillo
terminals: All terminals within the jurisdictional waters of the Port of Manzanillo

billing_logic_definitions.service_description: Includes towage assistance for Arrivals (Entrada), Departures (Salida), or Movements (Movimiento) for self-propelled vessels.

time_measurement.movement_time_definition: Legally defined as 20 minutes before the time indicated in the service request
time_measurement.start_trigger: Starts when lines are exchanged or the tug is ready at the agreed location
time_measurement.end_trigger: Ends when lines are cast off or as indicated by the pilot

duration_logic.rounding: Any fraction of 15 minutes is charged as a full 15-minute period
duration_logic.overtime_surcharge_basis: 25% of the basic maneuver quota per 15-minute increment

billing_logic_definitions.technical_criteria_reference: Rates apply per maneuver based on Technical Criteria for the Provision of Port Towage Services issued by SEMAR.

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Bow Thruster Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.vessel_condition_specific: Vessels over 15,000 GRT using an operational Bow Thruster and effectively employing only one tug
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.note: If two or more tugs are used, the full tariff applies without discount

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Small Vessel Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.logic: The applicable charge is 70% of the total maneuver amount

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Third Tug Request
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Express request for a third tug by user or authority
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.logic: Charged at 50% of the basic quota corresponding to the vessel's GRT range

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Late Cancellation
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Notice given < 1 hour before tug movement (Requested Time minus 20 mins)

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Cancellation After Movement
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: User desists from service once tugs have started moving

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Waiting / Standby Time
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Tugs must wait due to causes imputable to the user
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.basis: Per hour or fraction of wait time, starting from the time indicated in request

exclusions_and_special_services.note: Not subject to fixed rates; subject to negotiation based on international maritime customs

administrative_subtext.notice_period: Service must be requested in writing at least 3 hours in advance during provider office hours
administrative_subtext.payment_requirement: Users must cover the estimated maneuver amount at the time of request; final adjustment made upon invoice presentation
administrative_subtext.resolution_authority: General Directorate of Ports of the Secretariat of the Navy (SEMAR)
